results.title: ‘Still awesome’: Drought will blunt and shorten Colorado’s wildflower season, but experts say there’ll be plenty of color
results.description: Widespread drought is blunting — but won’t completely obliterate — the wildflower bloom in Colorado’s Rocky Mountains this summer, according to experts. U.S. Forest Service Rocky Mountain Regional Botanist Tyler Johnson said the timing and...

results.title: World Cup 2026: USMNT draws its most-watched telecast ever during win over Paraguay, averaging close to 16 million viewers
results.description: The United State men’s national team inspired confidence on Friday night that it can make a run in the 2026 World Cup. At SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, California, the Americans turned in a showing that belonged in Hollywood. They started and finished aggressive, dominating possession throughout a 4-1 victory over Paraguay in their first match [...] The post World Cup 2026: USMNT draws its most-watched telecast ever during win over Paraguay, averaging close to 16 million viewers appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: UNILAG first-class graduate celebrates bagging PhD degree from Harvard University, fulfils her dream
results.description: A first-class graduate of the University of Lagos (UNILAG) has fulfilled her secondary school dream as she earned a PhD degree from Harvard University.

results.title: Charlotte Henshaw powers to double gold at Europeans
results.description: Charlotte Henshaw stormed to two gold medals on Saturday at the European Sprint and Paracanoe Championships in Montemor.
